CONVICTION.title: Conviction
CONVICTION.description: The Penitent's spiritual scale. Ascending moves Conviction toward Faith. Descending moves it toward Burden.
ASCEND.title: Ascend
ASCEND.description: Move Conviction toward Faith. Remove up to that much Burden. Any excess becomes Faith.
DESCEND.title: Descend
DESCEND.description: Move Conviction toward Burden. Remove up to that much Faith. Any excess becomes Burden.
FAITH.title: Faith
FAITH.description: Positive Conviction. Generally used to prevent Burden
BURDEN.title: Burden
BURDEN.description: Negative Conviction. At combat's end, lose HP equal to your Burden. If this would kill you, survive at 1 HP and lose Max HP for each unpaid HP.
ATONE.title: Atone
ATONE.description: Heal the target. The Penitent Descends by the HP restored.
